milestone_register.milestone: Business objective and delivery model captured
milestone_register.acceptance: Residential production burden, quality objective, and cutting-edge-not-bleeding-edge principle documented
Dimension, wall, block, model-space, paper-space, LiDAR, and self-check rules preserved
908 files and 8.2 GiB reconciled in protected inventory
Five of five validation pairs passed
91,688,946 source points processed; figures, slices, and overlays published client-safely
Brian authorized Existing Main Level As-Built Floor Plan, DWG + PDF, $600, due July 22
Current shared package recorded as immutable production baseline
Target DWG opens; xrefs, fonts, plot style, layouts, and title block reproduce
Envelope, walls, partitions, openings, stairs, and fixed content drafted from controlling evidence
Source-supported annotations follow confirmed BDPC standards and 1/2-inch convention
No unexplained gaps, duplicates, unreviewed candidates, or standards violations
DWG opens cleanly and PDF matches final visible drawing without clipping
One native DWG and one PDF delivered with unresolved-condition disclosure if required
One consolidated in-scope drafting correction resolved and final package accepted

file_controls.control: Use only files belonging to the active Dunn package; preserve originals and record the production copy

Preserve native coordinates; no unrecorded transform or registration claim
Anchor and cross-check only; do not elevate above confirmed project dimensions
Validate block integrity and do not import unrelated project geometry

file_controls.role: Title block, paper-space, dimensions, fonts, plotting, and presentation
file_controls.control: Use current presentation logic after native dependency validation

cad_prep_register.acceptance: Successful $600 payment is visible in Stripe
Current shared project package is copied to a controlled, dated working set
Original source files remain read-only and unchanged
Drawing units, point-cloud units, origin, and scale relationship are documented
Target DWG opens without production-critical errors
Fonts, SHX, xrefs, images, object support, CTB/STB, and page setups are available or disclosed
Door, window, fixture, appliance, and annotation blocks are inventoried as approved, reject, or needs review
Exploded blocks, duplicate definitions, scale anomalies, and layer contamination are identified
Title block, paper space, dimensions, text, lineweights, viewport, and plot behavior reproduce
Scale/orientation are anchored and material discrepancies are logged
Typical framed walls begin at 3.5 inches and graduate only from evidence
Established blocks and known sizes are reused where supported
Chained and overall dimensions reconcile and display no finer than 1/2 inch
Audit, purge judgment, layer/property, dependency, viewport, page setup, and plot checks pass

automation_register.human_control: Results establish file integrity, not registration or architectural truth
Human selects useful evidence and rejects artifacts
Slice height and contributing points reviewed
No automatic transform or registration acceptance
Every block classified approved, reject, or needs review
Findings inform cleanup; no automatic destructive rewrite
Generated candidates never become issued geometry without review

automation_register.human_control: Exceptions resolved or disclosed before issue

automation_register.capability: Viewport, page setup, and plot comparison

qa_register.check: Exactly one existing main-level floor-plan sheet
qa_register.acceptance: No proposed, site, design, or other-floor content is issued
Production baseline is frozen and traceable
Scale checks reconcile with reliable project dimensions
No unrecorded transform or registration claim
3.5-inch basis used unless evidence supports another assembly
No unexplained gaps, overlaps, duplicate lines, or unreviewed candidates
Locations and sizes are source-supported; established blocks reused when appropriate
Placed only where supported by controlling evidence
No finer residential dimension is displayed without direction
Dimension arithmetic agrees with measured geometry within approved tolerance
Every annotation is supported or clearly qualified
Matches supplied BDPC standards with no unexplained overrides
Scale, layer, attributes, and insertion behavior are valid

qa_register.check: Xrefs, fonts, SHX, images, and object support
qa_register.acceptance: No production-critical unresolved reference or substitution
DWG opens in confirmed target environment without critical errors
No unresolved audit error affecting delivery

qa_register.check: Title block, layout, viewport, and page setup
qa_register.acceptance: Sheet presentation reproduces the confirmed BDPC standard
PDF is legible, correctly framed, unclipped, and visually consistent with the final DWG
Material uncertainty is disclosed rather than concealed

acceptance_criteria: The package contains one Existing Main Level As-Built Floor Plan only, in native AutoCAD DWG and PDF formats
The DWG opens in the confirmed target version with no known production-critical dependency failure
The plan reflects the controlling point cloud and supporting information without proposed design or unsupported conditions
Walls and closed boundaries have no unexplained gaps, duplicates, or unreviewed candidate geometry
Typical 2×4 framed walls use the confirmed 3.5-inch basis unless evidence supports a different assembly
Doors, windows, openings, stairs, fixtures, and fixed equipment are placed where supported or disclosed as unresolved
Dimensions follow the confirmed 1/2-inch residential convention and chained/overall dimensions reconcile
Dimensions, labels, room names, and notes are source-supported or clearly qualified
The PDF is legible, correctly framed, free of clipping, and consistent with the final visible DWG
Material unresolved conditions or approved departures are disclosed rather than concealed

risk_register.response: Keep production blocked and payment CTA persistent; verify Stripe immediately after payment
Disclose gate-related schedule impact; do not hide lost production time
Apply source hierarchy, freeze baseline, and escalate only material conflicts
Preserve native coordinates and reconcile against dimensions and City floor plate; make no registration claim
Validate fonts, xrefs, plot styles, object support, layouts, and page setups before drafting reliance
Classify reusable blocks and audit scale, layers, attributes, and exploded-state risk

deadline_control: Because payment remains outstanding, production is blocked. Any deadline impact caused by an uncleared activation gate is disclosed rather than hidden.
